sections: Phase 2B Runtime Integration PR Train Proposal
What Must Not Be Integrated Yet

uaspArtifactReality.runtimeConsumption: Docs and contract tests only; no app/components/lib runtime consumer imports the UASP schema.
First-batch mappings exist, but runtime scale catalog/lookup does not return UASP fields.
Domain definitions are contract-governed; result/report/test detail runtime does not consume decision domains.
Guard rules exist for claim, recommendation, SEO/GEO, and freemium, but they do not alter public runtime behavior.
Policy exists; no UASP profile storage or sensitivity runtime is wired.
Dashboard says the contract layer is ready while runtime implementation is out of scope.

backendScaleRegistryIntegration.currentBackendState: Already runtime-present through scale registry, attempts, results, SKU, report access, and scale lookup APIs.
backendScaleRegistryIntegration.phase2bHandling: Use as join key for read-only uasp_signal_v1.

backendScaleRegistryIntegration.currentBackendState: Derivable from primary_slug and slug maps.
backendScaleRegistryIntegration.phase2bHandling: Expose via existing lookup/catalog payload; do not duplicate in UASP storage.

backendScaleRegistryIntegration.currentBackendState: Partially available through public forms projection and take flow form selection.
backendScaleRegistryIntegration.phase2bHandling: Keep as transform-derived field first; do not require DB migration in first runtime envelope.
Add to backend-owned read-only scale metadata projection.

backendScaleRegistryIntegration.currentBackendState: Defined in UASP policy; backend has separate hardcoded sensitive scale treatment.
backendScaleRegistryIntegration.phase2bHandling: Expose read-only after policy alignment; do not use for storage yet.
Backend response field first; frontend may render bounded signal meaning later.

backendScaleRegistryIntegration.currentBackendState: UASP artifact-only; runtime career claim gating uses claim_permissions.
backendScaleRegistryIntegration.phase2bHandling: Add guard metadata; do not replace career claim_permissions.

backendScaleRegistryIntegration.currentBackendState: Policy exists, but no UASP-governed profile persistence exists.
backendScaleRegistryIntegration.phase2bHandling: Metadata only; runtime storage must remain blocked.

backendScaleRegistryIntegration.currentBackendState: UASP artifact-only; career recommendation runtime is snapshot/graph-specific.
backendScaleRegistryIntegration.phase2bHandling: Guard-only. Do not feed scoring or recommendation runtime.

backendScaleRegistryIntegration.currentBackendState: UASP artifact-only; runtime uses indexability, robots, sitemap, llms exposure policy.
backendScaleRegistryIntegration.phase2bHandling: Non-widening guard only. Do not auto-add sitemap/llms URLs.

backendScaleRegistryIntegration.currentBackendState: UASP artifact-only; runtime uses SKU, report access, offers, entitlement.
backendScaleRegistryIntegration.phase2bHandling: Readiness/claim guard only. Do not change checkout or report access.

frontendTestRuntimeIntegration.currentState: Uses backend catalog items overlaid with frontend fallback public test seeds; no UASP metadata.
frontendTestRuntimeIntegration.phase2bRecommendation: Add UASP read-only guard before future scale onboarding; do not alter current card UI.

frontendTestRuntimeIntegration.currentState: Hardcoded canonical slug map and aliases.
frontendTestRuntimeIntegration.phase2bRecommendation: Keep as routing compatibility; do not let it become UASP authority.

frontendTestRuntimeIntegration.currentState: Consumes lookup, landing_surface_v1, answer/SEO authority and fallback gates; no UASP signal_type or claim_level.
frontendTestRuntimeIntegration.phase2bRecommendation: Later render bounded signal meaning from backend UASP metadata.

frontendTestRuntimeIntegration.currentState: Dispatches clients by scale_code; MBTI/Big5/Enneagram/RIASEC form behavior remains scale-specific.
frontendTestRuntimeIntegration.phase2bRecommendation: Do not generalize take flow in report train or Phase 2B metadata envelope.

frontendTestRuntimeIntegration.currentState: Can expose current public tests without UASP readiness if not gated.
frontendTestRuntimeIntegration.phase2bRecommendation: Future scale additions must fail without UASP contract/fallback owner.

frontendTestRuntimeIntegration.currentState: Shell routing is scale-specific and does not consume UASP metadata.
frontendTestRuntimeIntegration.phase2bRecommendation: Add metadata envelope consumption later without changing shells.

resultReportUaspIntegration.currentState: Carries scale_code, score data, result data, and scale-specific public projections; no UASP metadata envelope.
resultReportUaspIntegration.phase2bBoundary: Add read-only uasp_signal_v1 metadata. Do not change scoring or result interpretation.

resultReportUaspIntegration.currentState: Builds scale-specific report payloads and access modules; no UASP metadata fields.
resultReportUaspIntegration.phase2bBoundary: Add read-only signal metadata for display/guarding only. Do not change report entitlement.

resultReportUaspIntegration.currentState: Routes by scale-specific shells and projections.
resultReportUaspIntegration.phase2bBoundary: Consume UASP metadata only after backend envelope exists; do not rewire shell selection.

resultReportUaspIntegration.currentState: Uses scale-specific report shells and module access metadata.
resultReportUaspIntegration.phase2bBoundary: UASP metadata can render caveats and signal meaning, not modules or paid access.

resultReportUaspIntegration.currentState: Policy exists but storage semantics are not runtime-governed.
resultReportUaspIntegration.phase2bBoundary: Result/report may display policy metadata, but must not persist profile signals.

resultReportUaspIntegration.currentState: Policy exists but recommender runtime is separate.
resultReportUaspIntegration.phase2bBoundary: Treat as display/guard only; never trigger recommender.

claimRuntimeIntegration.currentState: Exists as governance artifact and contract test.
claimRuntimeIntegration.runtimeBoundary: Preserve forbidden baseline; do not change public copy in report train.

claimRuntimeIntegration.currentState: Uses backend/frontend claim_permissions, not UASP claim_level.
claimRuntimeIntegration.runtimeBoundary: UASP claim_level can become guard metadata; it must not replace career claim permissions.

claimRuntimeIntegration.currentState: MBTI is identity/preference and next_step_only snapshot support.
claimRuntimeIntegration.runtimeBoundary: Can describe preference, expression, identity, and career-direction support; cannot predict career success.

claimRuntimeIntegration.currentState: Big Five is trait/workplace behavior and explanation_only.
claimRuntimeIntegration.runtimeBoundary: Can explain behavior/workstyle; cannot claim precise career matching.

claimRuntimeIntegration.currentState: RIASEC is interest vector and candidate_signal.
claimRuntimeIntegration.runtimeBoundary: Can describe career interest direction; cannot claim full or precise recommender runtime.
Can explain motivation/workstyle/relationship patterns; should not enter career recommendation mainline.
Must remain non-diagnostic, private/noindex, and not recommendation eligible.

evidenceRuntimeIntegration.currentState: Runtime baseline exists for visible evidence markers and page-family readiness.
evidenceRuntimeIntegration.phase2bBoundary: Keep visible-only rule; do not claim universal evidence readiness.

evidenceRuntimeIntegration.currentState: Defined in schema but not consumed by runtime.
evidenceRuntimeIntegration.phase2bBoundary: Add as metadata gate; do not generate new evidence content.

evidenceRuntimeIntegration.currentState: Not separated from page-level answer/evidence blocks.
evidenceRuntimeIntegration.phase2bBoundary: Requires future source authority before signal-specific evidence claims.

evidenceRuntimeIntegration.currentState: Existing governance requires visible FAQ/answer grounding; UASP does not drive it.
evidenceRuntimeIntegration.phase2bBoundary: Do not add hidden schema or FAQ stuffing.

evidenceRuntimeIntegration.currentState: Sensitive/mental-health examples are not UASP runtime-onboarded.
evidenceRuntimeIntegration.phase2bBoundary: Require disclaimer/privacy decision before public evidence or llms-full use.
